sourcesContent:
export const words = [
  {
    base: "beautiful",
    phonetic: "ˈbjuːtɪfʊl",
    meaning: "সুন্দর",
    examples: [
      { en: "She is beautiful.", bn: "" },
      { en: "This is a beautiful place.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "The sky looks beautiful today.", bn: "" },
      { en: "It is a beautiful garden.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She has a beautiful voice.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The painting is very beautiful.", bn: "" },
      { en: "We saw a beautiful view.", bn: "" },
      { en: "This flower is beautiful.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He drew a beautiful picture.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The city is beautiful at night.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She wore a beautiful dress.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Nature is beautiful.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["attractive", "pretty", "lovely", "gorgeous", "handsome"],
  },

  {
    base: "happiness",
    phonetic: "ˈhæpinəs",
    meaning: "সুখ",
    examples: [
      { en: "Happiness is important.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Money cannot buy happiness.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "She found happiness in life.", bn: "" },
      { en: "True happiness comes from within.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Happiness makes life better.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He smiled with happiness.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Family brings happiness.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Happiness is a choice.", bn: "" },
      { en: "They shared their happiness.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Success brought him happiness.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Simple life gives happiness.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She expressed happiness.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["joy", "pleasure", "bliss", "delight"],
  },

  {
    base: "friend",
    phonetic: "frend",
    meaning: "বন্ধু",
    examples: [
      { en: "He is my friend.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She is a good friend.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "I met my friend today.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She is a close friend.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Friends help each other.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He lost his friend.", bn: "" },
      { en: "We are best friends.", bn: "" },
      { en: "My friend called me.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She visited her friend.", bn: "" },
      { en: "They became friends.", bn: "" },
      { en: "A true friend is rare.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He trusted his friend.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["companion", "mate", "buddy", "colleague"],
  },

  {
    base: "book",
    phonetic: "bʊk",
    meaning: "বই",
    examples: [
      { en: "I read a book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "This is my book.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "She bought a book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "I love reading books.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The book is interesting.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He wrote a book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "I opened the book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She borrowed a book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The book is old.", bn: "" },
      { en: "I finished the book.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Books are knowledge.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He gave me a book.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["novel", "text", "volume", "publication"],
  },

  {
    base: "water",
    phonetic: "ˈwɔːtər",
    meaning: "পানি",
    examples: [
      { en: "I drink water.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Water is clean.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "She drinks water daily.", bn: "" },
      { en: "We need water to live.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The water is cold.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He spilled water.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Clean water is important.", bn: "" },
      { en: "I filled the bottle with water.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Water is life.", bn: "" },
      { en: "They drank water.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Hot water is useful.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The water flows fast.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["liquid", "fluid", "H2O"],
  },

  {
    base: "prison",
    phonetic: "ˈprɪzn",
    meaning: "কারাগার / জেল",
    examples: [
      { en: "He was sent to prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The prisoner is in prison.", bn: "" },
    ],
    moreexample: [
      { en: "He spent five years in prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The prison is heavily guarded.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Many criminals are kept in prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "She visited her brother in prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He escaped from prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The prison was built long ago.", bn: "" },
      { en: "Life in prison is very hard.", bn: "" },
      { en: "They transferred him to another prison.", bn: "" },
      { en: "The prison holds dangerous criminals.", bn: "" },
      { en: "He was released from prison.", bn: "" },
    ],
    synonyms: ["jail", "detention center", "lockup", "penitentiary"],
  },
];
